description: Collect data only for specific, lawful purposes

checks.recommendation: Limit your forms to only necessary fields (e.g., name, email).

description: Process personal data only with explicit consent

checks.recommendation: Implement a cookie‐consent banner and block non‐essential trackers until the user consents.

description: Inform data subjects of purposes, recipients, retention, etc.

checks.recommendation: Include clear statements in your Privacy Policy about data use, recipients, and retention periods.

description: Implement appropriate technical measures to secure data

checks.recommendation: Ensure your site uses a valid HTTPS certificate.
Add the Strict‑Transport‑Security header to enable HSTS.

description: Collect only adequate, relevant, and not excessive data

checks.recommendation: Remove any form fields requesting sensitive data (e.g., DOB, national ID) unless essential.

description: Keep personal data no longer than necessary

checks.recommendation: Specify retention periods in your Privacy Policy and delete data accordingly.

description: Data subjects have the right to access their data

checks.recommendation: Provide a contact email or form for users to request their data.

description: Data subjects have the right to correct inaccurate data

checks.recommendation: State in your Privacy Policy how users can request corrections.

description: Data subjects have the right to have data erased (‘right to be forgotten’)

checks.recommendation: Include a “delete my data” mechanism or email link in your Privacy Policy.
Ensure you have a visible Privacy Policy link on your homepage.
